mapper.select: SELECT config_id, config_key, config_value, config_type, description, encrypted_yn, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM config_table ORDER BY config_key
SELECT config_id, config_key, config_value, config_type, description, encrypted_yn, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM config_table WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT config_id, config_key, config_value, config_type, description, encrypted_yn, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM config_table WHERE config_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO config_table ( config_key, config_value, config_type, description, encrypted_yn, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{configKey}, #{configValue}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{configType}, ''), 'STRING'), #{description}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{encryptedYn}, ''), 'N'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE config_table SET config_key = #{request.configKey}, config_value = #{request.configValue}, config_type = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.configType}, ''), 'STRING'), description = #{request.description}, encrypted_yn = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.encryptedYn}, ''), 'N'), use_yn = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.useYn}, ''), 'Y'), updated_by = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE config_id = #{configId}
